properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v2 v5 v6 v2 v2 v7 v8

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: We have had enough Of getting everything we want We are weary of Living this life just for us Oh forgive us of Seeking Your hand and not Your Face Come and empty us Father were desperate in this place

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Holy Spirit, Fill us with Your fire Give us Your desires Hold us close to You Holy Spirit, Give us revelation A healing visitation Nothing else will do

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We want more And more And more And more of You

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: You have given us So much more than we deserve You deliver us By the power of Your Word So God we lift You up Giving You the honor that is Yours Thank you for your love Father this is what we're living for

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: We want more And more And more And more

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Oh the love that covers us Oh the Savior's mercy Oh the blood that makes us spotless Bride (Oh the Love) Oh the love that covers us Oh the Savior's mercy Oh the Blood that makes us spotless Bride

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Holy Spirit Fill us with your fire Give us your desires Hold us close to You

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: We want more And more And more of You (x2) You might also like Be (My Heart, My Hands, My Voice) Selah, At the cross Selah Wonderful, Merciful Savior Selah
